title: Remove Potion Particles
description: Eliminates visual clutter caused by potion/beacon particles.
body:
Compatibility: **_1.6.1_** to **_1.21.1_**.
===========================================

Remove Potion Particles completely eliminates the visual clutter caused by potion and beacon particles.

* * *

### Additional Information:

At only 3.6KB, this is a super-lightweight resource pack that prevents the particle effect particles from being loaded into VRAM. Paired with other performance-enhancing mods, you can expect a framerate increase upwards of 15 FPS using this resource pack making it perfect for lower-end systems.

While it does a great job of removing particle effects, it does unfortunately have a single drawback: it can sometimes make it slightly harder to confirm if a Zombie Villager has been splashed with a Potion of Weakness during the curing process. If you're actively working with Zombie Villagers it might be easier to temporarily disable this resource pack until you've finished curing the Zombie Villager.

* * *

### Support development:

If you enjoy this resource pack and would like to support my work, please consider making a donation. Even a donation as little as £1 or $1 is appreciated and helps keep me motivated to continue development on this resource pack.
